mapper.sql: u.id, u.name, u.rel_name, u.mobile, u.gender, u.password, u.email_status, u.email, u.rel_authentication_status, u.id_number, u.address, CASE u.status WHEN 1 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status_name, u.create_time, u.edit_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM d_user_mobile m JOIN d_user u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.mobile = #{mobile} AND m.status = 1 AND u.status = 1
SELECT FROM d_user_email e JOIN d_user u ON u.id = e.user_id WHERE e.email = #{email} AND e.status = 1 AND u.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_user (name, rel_name, mobile, gender, password, email_status, email, rel_authentication_status, id_number, address, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{relName}, #{mobile}, #{gender}, #{passwordHash}, #{emailStatus}, #{email}, #{relAuthenticationStatus}, #{idNumber}, #{address}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{statusCode})
INSERT INTO d_user_mobile (user_id, mobile, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{mobile}, #{now}, #{now}, 1)
INSERT INTO d_user_email (user_id, email, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{email}, #{now}, #{now}, 1)
